title: Proof Boundary — Coherence Beats Compliance
supported_claims: Organizations can satisfy visible process requirements while incentives, decision rights, and execution remain misaligned.
Process is useful when it supports sensemaking and decision quality rather than replacing them.
The draft defines coherence through aligned priorities, language, incentives, decisions, trust, and feedback.
unsupported_claims: A universal claim that compliance is always harmful.
Any quantified claim about transformation failure rates caused by compliance.
Any claim that process alone is sufficient or irrelevant in every context.
